preset_description: Dark = substance signal. Spotlights product capabilities and metrics. CTA and pricing are understated — features are the story, not conversion pressure.

brief.audience: Founding teams who want an AI-first design system

accent_tokens._note: Brand primary CTA color. Global — not per-preset. Two variants: button on a light/neutral section vs. on a dark section.

beats.name: Orientation
beats.rationale: Slim hero beat to anchor the page: confirms this is the AI-first design system for founding teams, gives immediate context and a clear page title before the decision moment. Required on every page.

beats.name: Evidence
beats.rationale: Validator archetype demands proof before committing. A concise proof-point block (key metrics, adoption stats, or performance data) satisfies their need for rational justification right before the decision, while staying within the stripped conversion-stage structure.

beats.name: Decision
beats.rationale: Conversion-stage rule requires Decision before Conversion. Presents plan comparison and pricing so the founding team can evaluate their options with clarity, directly following the evidence that justifies the investment.

beats.name: Conversion
beats.rationale: Primary CTA and commitment prompt placed immediately before Recovery, as required. Captures the purchase action while the Validator's confidence is highest after seeing evidence and pricing.

beats.name: Recovery
beats.rationale: Final beat handles secondary paths, FAQ links, and exit intent — ensures no visitor leaves without an alternative route back into the funnel.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.rationale: Global navigation — wayfinding and persistent CTA for the session.

sections.name: Hero
sections.rationale: Slim hero beat to anchor the page: confirms this is the AI-first design system for founding teams, gives immediate context and a clear page title before the decision moment. Required on every page.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.rationale: Conversion-stage rule requires Decision before Conversion. Presents plan comparison and pricing so the founding team can evaluate their options with clarity, directly following the evidence that justifies the investment.

sections.name: CTA
sections.rationale: Primary CTA and commitment prompt placed immediately before Recovery, as required. Captures the purchase action while the Validator's confidence is highest after seeing evidence and pricing.

sections.name: Footer
sections.rationale: Page close — brand mark, minimal navigation, and legal.

page.reasoning: At conversion funnel stage, the minimal variant is prescribed to 'strip nav_links, keep logo and single CTA only' — this focuses the visitor on the conversion decision without navigation distraction.
For conversion stage, 'use text-only: slim title and subhead only, no media, no secondary CTA — orients the visitor without competing with the decision moment below.'

slots.eyebrow: AI-first design system for founding teams
slots.headline: Your design system knows how to render. MODE teaches it why.
slots.subhead: The semantic intelligence layer that resolves component behavior, copy register, and visual emphasis to the right experience — without manual variants.
slots.trust_signal: One-time payment. Lifetime access. No subscription.

page.reasoning: Validator archetype with conversion goal requires 'highlighted variant for recommended plan' paired with 'Validator variant includes description and longer feature list' to build trust and guide selection.

slots.description: The full intelligence layer. Resolution engine, IA planner, multi-variant generation, palette map, and Next.js preview UI. Yours forever — no runtime dependency, no lock-in.
features: IA planner + multi-variant generation (Mover, Validator, Explorer)
Palette map with 3 presets — configure once, resolves automatically
Token dashboard — editable palette map and accent config
Bring your own Anthropic API key — you own the token spend

page.reasoning: Validator archetype at conversion stage requires 'Validator variant: include subhead and trust_signal (e.g., 'No credit card required')' — centered layout with trust signals converts founding teams effectively.

slots.headline: The intelligence layer is ready when you are.
slots.subhead: Running in under an hour. Configured once. No vendor dashboard, no usage billing — just a semantic layer your team owns.
slots.trust_signal: One-time payment. Lifetime access. Fork it, extend it, make it yours.

page.reasoning: At conversion funnel stage on pricing pages, 'with-cta variant recaptures departing users on key conversion pages — use on pricing and signup flows.'
